creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text: Generally, I am okay with the change.  However, I don't like TZ_KELVTOC* macros.  These stuff should stay in acpi_thermal.c.  At least, TZ_KELVTOC() macro should not be moved.  Also, I don't like TZ_* prefixes.  These macros should be prefixed with something else.  Actually, I am not even sure whether sysctl.h is the right file to put these misc. utility macros.
